name: SubDEdgeType
summary: ON_SubDEdgeType describes a subdivision edge. ON_SubDEdgeType is typically used when generating text descriptions or filtering edges during selection processes. Do not confuse ON_SubDEdgeType and ON_SubDEdgeTag. The unique types are single bits and suitable for use in bitwise logic.

enum_values.name: Unset
enum_values.summary: Type is unset or the edge is not valid.

enum_values.name: Wire
enum_values.summary: The edge has zero faces and the tag is ON_SubDEdgeTag::Crease.

enum_values.name: Boundary
enum_values.summary: The edge has one face and the tag is ON_SubDEdgeTag::Crease.

enum_values.name: InteriorSmooth
enum_values.summary: The edge has two faces, the tag is ON_SubDEdgeTag::Smooth or ON_SubDEdgeTag::SmoothX, and the edge sharpness is zero. Note that ON_SubEdge::IsSmoothNotSharp() returns true if and only if ON_SubEdge::EdgeType() is InteriorSmooth.

enum_values.name: InteriorSharp
enum_values.summary: The edge has two faces, the tag is ON_SubDEdgeTag::Smooth or ON_SubDEdgeTag::SmoothX, and the edge sharpness is nonzero. Note that ON_SubEdge::IsSharp() returns true if and only if ON_SubEdge::EdgeType() is InteriorSharp.

enum_values.name: InteriorCrease
enum_values.summary: The edge has two faces and the tag is ON_SubDEdgeTag::Crease.

enum_values.name: Nonmanifold
enum_values.summary: The edge has three or more faces and the tag is ON_SubDEdgeTag::Crease.

enum_values.name: Invalid
enum_values.summary: The edge has an invalid combination of face count, tag, and sharpness properties.

enum_values.name: InteriorMask
enum_values.summary: A mask for all interior edge types. Interior edges have 2 faces.

enum_values.name: ValidTypesMask
enum_values.summary: A mask for all valid edge types.
